top_signals.title: Oil Jumps as Iran’s Attacks on Israel Put Ceasefire at Risk
top_signals.summary: Oil rebounded after Iran fired several rounds of missiles toward Israel, threatening a fragile ceasefire as talks to end the war falter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Stock Futures Drop After Tech Selloff, Oil Up: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Equities looked set for more losses after a tech-led selloff on Wall Street Friday and a robust jobs report fueled expectations for an interest-rate hike by the Federal Reserve.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Agencies publish resolution plan feedback letters for certain domestic and foreign banking organizations
top_signals.summary: Agencies publish resolution plan feedback letters for certain domestic and foreign banking organizations
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Barr, Deregulating in a Financial Boom: What Could Go Wrong?
top_signals.summary: Speech At American University, Washington, D.C.

top_signals.title: Waller, Policy Risks Have Changed
top_signals.summary: Speech At The Centre for Central Banking Guest Lecture, Frankfurt School of Finance and Management, Frankfurt, Germany
